title: epilobium glabellum var. tetragonum
intro: Epilobium glabellum var. tetragonum, also known as willowherb or fireweed, is a perennial plant species in the willowherb family with a wide distribution across the Northern Hemisphere. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its rich content of anthraquinones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epilobium glabellum var. tetragonum include its potential to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. This plant is traditionally prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion for medicinal use, with some herbalists also recommending it in capsule or tablet form.
